{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184955F69A0A5F866CE2344740"}"},"total":8},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616516757543420734","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个书很不错，作者非常有底蕴，未来评分肯定不低于8.0"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773365386,"group_id":"7609956171952163864","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个作者很懒什么都没留下","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9UP4qrUnHKbLChNDwUZAE5/VPGVdkq3GBpRnfOB0Mn5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7071bcb718f54cc6a6c5bee00cb413cb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788822&x-signature=wylMlFK%2FcmpToBvWVtD4U5MFF0A%3D","user_id":"4160994763351560","user_name":"Leben"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4160994763351560","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7609956171952163864","book_info":{"abstract":"一睁眼，我成了大宋开国皇帝赵匡胤的嫡孙，赵惟吉。
时间，开宝四年。地点，大宋开封。
身份尊贵，血脉至正，可我只是个刚满月的婴儿。
前方是“烛影斧声”的千古谜案，皇祖父赵匡胤即将离奇驾崩，二叔赵光义的龙袍早已按捺不住。父亲赵德昭性格仁懦，即将被逼自尽。而我，这个太祖的嫡孙血脉，也将在几年后“无疾而终”。
开局即是死局！
我不能说，不能写，甚至不能跑。但我能哭，能笑，能用一个婴儿最无害的姿态，传递最致命的信息。
皇祖父的御膳有毒？我用一声啼哭让他躲过一劫。
朝堂上有二叔的奸党？我用咿呀学语时抓起的竹简，为他指点迷津。
沙盘上推演北伐，僵持不下？我用一块糕点，点出辽军粮道的死穴！
十年布局，十年引导。我将这位雄才大略的铁血帝王，一步步“养成”为只属于我一人的最强靠山。
当“烛影斧声”之夜再度降临，手持利斧的赵光义看到的，不再是病榻上虚弱的兄长，而是龙榻前，我与皇祖父两双冰冷的眼睛。
这一次，朕要让二叔明白，什么叫真正的天命所归！
大宋的江山，将由我重整。这天下的版图，将由我重绘！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oaddaa6399675cfbaeb600e4ce0646da0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"刷牙吧小姐","author_id":"","book_id":"7609956171952163864","book_name":"大宋太祖嫡孙：朕要重整河山","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7609956279758357016","read_count":"21741","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"214077"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"93","tags":"历史古代,历史,宋朝,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oaddaa6399675cfbaeb600e4ce0646da0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446995&x-signature=aVkaBXHkyk6kbhzjU%2Fz5n%2BpFN%2Fs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3844371122230883","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184955F69A0A5F866CE2344740"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":733,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3822,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":506},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1773366821,"author_reply_time":1773366837,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_
